attributes.description: Monitoring of system logs for OVH dedicated servers. SRE KPIs: activity volume, server health, event distribution, errors, and time-series trends.

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| STATS `Total Count` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| STATS `Total Count` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| STATS `Distinct Servers` = COUNT_DISTINCT(ovh_dedicated_servers.log.server_name)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| STATS `Distinct Servers` = COUNT_DISTINCT(ovh_dedicated_servers.log.server_name)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE event.type == "info"
| STATS `Count of log events` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE event.type == "info"
| STATS `Count of log events` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE error.message IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Count of log events` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE error.message IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Count of log events` = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| STATS `Count of events` = COUNT() BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time`

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| STATS `Count of events` = COUNT() BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time`

attributes.title: Count of Log Events Over Time – logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default

embeddableConfig.title: Count of Log Events Over Time – logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT() BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Event Type` = event.type
| SORT `Time Bucket`

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT() BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Event Type` = event.type
| SORT `Time Bucket`

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT(*) BY event.type

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT(*) BY event.type

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT(*) BY `event.category`
| SORT `Event Count` DESC

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT(*) BY `event.category`
| SORT `Event Count` DESC

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| STATS `Total Events` = COUNT(*) BY `Server Name` = ovh_dedicated_servers.log.server_name
| SORT `Total Events` DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| STATS `Total Events` = COUNT(*) BY `Server Name` = ovh_dedicated_servers.log.server_name
| SORT `Total Events` DESC
| LIMIT 15

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Server Name` = ovh_dedicated_servers.log.server_name

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| EVAL words = SPLIT(message, " ")
| MV_EXPAND words
| STATS `Term Frequency` = COUNT() BY `Term` = words
| SORT `Term Frequency` DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| EVAL words = SPLIT(message, " ")
| MV_EXPAND words
| STATS `Term Frequency` = COUNT() BY `Term` = words
| SORT `Term Frequency` DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE error.message IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time Bucket`

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| WHERE error.message IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Event Count` = COUNT(*) BY `Time Bucket` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time Bucket`

query.esql:
FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| KEEP @timestamp, ovh_dedicated_servers.log.server_name, message, event.type, event.category, event.kind, error.message
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-ovh_dedicated_servers.log-default
| KEEP @timestamp, ovh_dedicated_servers.log.server_name, message, event.type, event.category, event.kind, error.message
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100
